name: Relative Reduction in AT/AF Episodes Over 7 Days with Reactive ATP
description: This metric measures the effectiveness of the Reactive ATP algorithm in decreasing the incidence of atrial tachyarrhythmia or atrial fibrillation episodes lasting longer than seven days, with a reported 36% reduction compared to baseline. Its value depends on patient selection, adherence to programming, and arrhythmia detection accuracy, and may be limited by patient compliance and device settings.
